Meaning.Vi: Ngọn lửa; sự cháy; hỏa hoạn
Meaning.En: A visible, hot, glowing body of burning material; also refers to the act of discharging a weapon or dismissing someone from employment.
Meaning.Example: The firefighters arrived quickly to put out the fire.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình huống có ngọn lửa bùng cháy, thường nguy hiểm.
Situation.En: A situation involving uncontrolled burning, often dangerous.

Situation.Vi: Người bị sa thải (thường dùng trong cụm "get fired").
Situation.En: A person who has been dismissed from their job.

Meaning.Vi: Bắn (súng); sa thải (nhân viên); làm cháy
Meaning.En: To discharge a projectile from a weapon; to dismiss someone from employment; to set something ablaze.
Meaning.Example: The company fired 200 employees due to budget cuts.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống nhân viên bị sa thải vì vi phạm hoặc cắt giảm chi phí.
Situation.En: A situation where an employee is dismissed, often unexpectedly, due to performance or economic reasons.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống bắn súng hoặc phóng tên lửa.
Situation.En: A situation involving discharging a weapon, such as in military or self-defense contexts.

Meaning.Vi: Sự hăng hái, nhiệt huyết; động lực mạnh mẽ
Meaning.En: Metaphorical intensity, passion, or drive (e.g., "fire in the belly").
Meaning.Example: She fought with fire and determination to win the championship.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống nói về tinh thần chiến đấu, khát vọng thành công.
Situation.En: A situation describing strong motivation, passion, or competitive drive.
